[b]This mod adds the Calamity soundtrack and music boxes for each of its songs.[/b] It is intended to be used alongside the Calamity Mod, but can be used alone. You will need to use the Calamity Mod in order to naturally obtain the

title: Recipe Browser
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/W2c5CX6.gif[/img]

[h1]Recipe Browser![/h1]
Recipe Browser is an indispensable mod for any player. It provides a service to the user that the Guide could only dream of providing. [img]https://i.imgur.com/420S4WA.gif[/img] With Recipe Browser, you have access to powerful tools to help you plan out what items you want to craft. You'll

title: Boss Checklist
description:
[b]Bug reports in the workshop comments here will likely not be seen, come to our Discord or Github to report issues.[/b]

[h2]Boss Checklist[/h2]
Boss Checklist lets you view a checklist of all available bosses while playing so you can progress through them as you defeat them. Toggle the checklist with the hotkey assigned to it in the settings. Visit [u]'Se

title: Magic Storage
description:
Are you tired of having a mess of chests in your base? Never remember where you put your items, and have to run across your entire house to get from chest to chest? This mod will solve all of your problems!

This mod offers a solution to storage problems once and for all. It allows you to construct a central network to store all your items, that you can acce

title: absoluteAquarian Utilities (SerousCommonLib)
description:
The common library for absoluteAquarian's various mods.

The DLL, PDB and XML files for this mod can be found at:
https://github.com/absoluteAquarian/SerousCommonLib/releases/tag/v1.0.6.2

Many features are included in this mod, including but not limited to:
- A more performant alternative to handling text input, albeit with the inability to handle chat tags

title: AlchemistNPC Lite
description:
This mod adds 7 NPCs (Alchemist, Brewer, Jeweler, Young Brewer, Operator, Architect and Musician), who sell potions, materials and some other stuff. 
New combinations of potions are sold by the Young Brewer.

The spawn condition for the Alchemist, the Jeweler & the Brewer is to kill the Eye of Ctulhu. 
The Young Brewer spawns while both the Alchemist & the B

title: Ore Excavator (1.4.3/1.4.4 Veinminer)

Found an issue? Join our Discord and help report it: https://discord.gg/FtrsRtPe6h

title: Subworld Library
description:
An API for modders to easily add dimensions (referred to as subworlds) to their mods, making all the necessary code injections, handling Multiplayer and managing every subworld.

Report issues on the forum page or GitHub:
https://forums.terraria.org/index.php?threads/86283
https://github.com/jjohnsnaill/SubworldLibrary/issues

Wiki:
https://github.com/jjohns

title: Fargo's Mutant Mod
description:
A Quality of Life mod that makes various adjustments and additions across the game to provide information and convenience.
Adds the Mutant town NPC, who sells boss summons of nearly every mod, along several others.
Other features include:
-Infinite ammos, potions, etc at high enough stack
-Craftable instant builds for common world infrastructure like skybrid

title: Luminance
description:
Luminance is a library mod that provides a range of useful features to mods. For more information, check the [url=https://github.com/DominicKarma/Luminance] github [/url].

Developed By Lucille Karma[/quote]

title: Boss Cursor
description:
Boss cursor adds arrows around your character that points towards the boss.

This way you do not need the mini-map open to be able to properly aim.

The size and transparency of the arrow changes the closer the boss is, so that you get a good feel for how far away the boss is, even when it is off screen.

Using the overlay map hides the cursor.

Boss cursor

title: Calamity's Vanities
description:
[h1]Calamity's Vanities[/h1]
[url=https://discord.gg/Qgx8eRA]Discord[/url] [url=https://terrariamods.wiki.gg/Calamity's_Vanities]Official Wiki[/url]

Calamity's Vanities is a mod which aims to add more vanity items/pets to the Calamity mod. 
The mod does not require Calamity to run.

Note: This mod is not an official addon to Calamity, rather just a fun fan

title: Wing Slot Extra
description:
[b]This mod adds a dedicated wing slot near the armor and accessories page of the inventory. Updated with permission from original author abluescarab.[/b]

[h1]Usage[/h1]
• Right-click on wings from inventory to move it to wing slot.
• Right-click vanity wings to swap with equipped wings.
• Left-click a set of wings or a dye, then place it in the slot.
• Lef

description:

The mod is planned to add much more content in the future, suc

title: Census - Town NPC Checklist
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/W2c5CX6.gif[/img]

[h1]Overview[/h1]
Census - Town NPC Checklist modifies the housing panel to show missing townspeople. 

A "✓" signifies that the conditions for spawning that npc have been fulfilled. An "X" means that conditions have not been fulfilled. A "?" means the game hasn't checked Town NPC spawn conditions yet. Hover over i

title: Thorium Mod
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/KRBo4dm.png[/img]

Welcome to the Thorium Mod! The [b]Thorium Mod[/b] is a "Vanilla+" content pack that adds a massive variety of new items, weapons, armors, NPCs, bosses, and even 3 new classes into the vast world of Terraria!

With magnificent sprites from BrutalLama, AdipemDragon, Barometz, BluNinja, and many others, as well as cr

title: Fargo's Souls Mod
description:
Fargo's Souls Mod is a content mod that adds the powerful Enchantments and Souls accessories, as well as a variety of bosses and minibosses.
Features the Eternity Mode, a mode that reworks many parts of the game and adds exciting challenge!

If you intend to use this mod with the Calamity Mod, use the official Fargo's Souls DLC addon mod. https://steamcommun

title: Calamity: Wrath of the Gods
description:
Adds three interesting new bosses and a story-based character to the game.

The visual effects within this mod may be a bit extreme for some. If photosensitivity is a concern, or if you simply want it toned down a bit, refer to the configuration options.

Credits to the following individuals for helping (whether directly or indirectly) in the creation of the

title: Cheat Sheet
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/W2c5CX6.gif[/img]

Cheat Sheet is a tool for developers and those who just want to play around with any vanilla or mod item, recipe, or NPC. There are also tools to "paint" tiles to make building easier and faster.
Press K (or whatever hotkey you've assigned to "Toggle Cheat Sheet Hotbar") or click the button at the bottom center of

title: LuiAFK Reborn
description:
[h1]LuiAFK Reborn[/h1]

Author and Owner of the original Code: Luiafk
Ported and Maintained by: miningcrack and Brutaliaa

If you encounter any bugs or problems please let us know in the discord bellow with your er

title: HERO's Mod
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/W2c5CX6.gif[/img]

HERO's mod is a tools mod. It is a pick and choose server mod that allows you to decide how you want to run your world. You can turn on and off any features and you can allow different groups to use some but not all features. This tool has full group management with a GUI. 

There are over 25 tools and many more in

title: Auto Trash
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/W2c5CX6.gif[/img]

[h1]Overview[/h1]
Adds an Auto-Trash Slot:
Place items in the Auto-Trash slot to immediately trash them as they are picked up later. Useful for all those items that clutter your inventory. 

Ctrl+Shift click inventory items to quickly add to auto trash list.

You can also use the config to have the Auto-Trash slot

title: Structure Helper
description:
[h1]The famous world generation library, now better, faster, and more efficient than ever![/h1]

StructureHelper 3.0 has arrived, with slimmer files, faster generation, and an easier to use API! You can find porting instructions here if you're a developer: https://github.com/ScalarVector1/StructureHelper/wiki/3.0-Porting-Guide

[h1]About[/h1]

StructureHelpe

title: Auto Reforge
description:
Auto Reforge is a  mod that replaces normal reforge menu with more complex one that allows you to reforge automaticly.[quote=tModLoader AutoReroll]
Developed By Sad Onion[/quote]

Checkout my game: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2842010/Deeper_Than_Hell/

title: Calamity Mod Infernum Mode
description:
An extension mod for Calamity that adds an extra difficulty - Infernum

This difficulty is harder than Death mode and can be activated with the difficulty selection UI in Calamity.
The primary focus of the mod is expansive reworking of boss AIs.

Some bosses gain extra phases for maximum "It's not over yet!" energy.

Please report any bugs/issues via the Bug

title: Basic Automated (Vein) Mining
description:
[b]Basic Automated Mining (BAM) is a simple, lightweight veinminer alternative.[/b]

[b]Comes with:[/b]
• No hotkeys, just mine ores to vein mine
• 50% smaller packet size
• No complex tile scanning
• Dynamic tile breaking limits
• Very lightweight

[b]Additional features:[/b]
• Whitelist blocks instantly with [b]middle-mouse button (scroll wheel) + right-cl

title: DAYBREAK
description:
DAYBREAK is a library mod. It does nothing on its own! Only use this if a mod depends on it.

For more information:
- https://github.com/gold-meridian/daybreak-mod
- https://discord.gg/6Fm4ZTHVub

[b]Vanilla Calamity Music Mod (aka VCMM) is an in-progress music expansion for Calamity.[/b] It aims to replace the entire vanilla Terraria soundtrack with new songs made in the context of the Calamity soundtrack. It is i

title: InnoVault
description:
InnoVault is an API Mod that provides developers with essential code support, including basic APIs for UI, Tile Processor, Particle,  NBT Save or Load, and more.

For more information, visit the [url=https://github.com/hocha113/InnoVault] InnoVault GitHub repository [/url], where you can download the source code for InnoVault.

If you'd like to learn how to

title: Shorter Respawn Time
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/W2c5CX6.gif[/img]

This mod allow customizing respawn time after death. The respawn times can be configured in-game.

Tweak "Expert Mode Penalty Scale" and "Boss Penalty Scale" if you'd like expert and boss deaths to be less penalized. Tweak "Global Respawn Scale" to lower all respawn times.

The "Shorter Respawn Preset" is the defau

title: Colored Calamity Relics
description:
Adds color to every relic from the Calamity Mod. If relics were placed without the mod loaded prior, break and re-place the relic to add the colors.
Note that the mod places variants of relic tiles, and unloading the mod will also unload any existing relic tiles in worlds.

All colored sprites are done by Myra. Some relics based on non-public concept arts ma

title: Better Boss Health Bar for 1.4.4+
description:
[h2] NOTICE: Mod side changed to NoSync due to the way players were handled for boss target display. Please let me know if there are any issues [/h2]

This is a 1.4.4+ reimplementation of n0t_UN_Owen's mod Better Boss Health Bar, which was removed from the Steam Workshop and ultimately from the mod list after citing that the 1.4.4 update made the health of t

title: ArmamentDisplay
description:
Contents：
Multiplayer is available.
The display of the hand-held weapon is realized. Because modded weapons are implemented in different ways, this mod can not be adapted to all modded weapons.
Implemented more cool slashing effects(The hitbox of the weapon is modified).
Items in the world have light effects.
With a unrealized weapon called the FirstFractal.

title: High FPS Support
description:
Allows rendering the game at above 60FPS without affecting the speed of world simulation.

This mod is entirely client-side.
In singleplayer there are config settings to speed up or slow down the game for fun.
This mod also contains a few optimizations that can help with reaching higher frame rates. They are disabled by default and can be enabled through the

title: Which Mod Is This From? (WMITF)
description:
When you look at a modded item, block or NPC, WMITF will show you the name of the mod which it came from.

This can be useful if you're playing with lots of mods at once, or if you're a YouTuber and you want your viewers to see which mods you're using.

(Inspired by the Minecraft mod WAILA by ProfMobius)

Also, big thanks to Pop000100 for maintaining the mod

title: Max Stack Plus Extra
description:
Makes the stacking of items configurable and easily changable. Originally by NuovaPrime, 1.4 port by RighteousRyan

Changelog:

V1.4.0.3
- Updated to 1.4.4.9

V1.4.0.2
- Fixed Mod.Properties issue

V1.4.0.1
- Added dedication to NuovaPrime

V1.4
- Updated to the 1.4 alpha release.

V1.1.0.4
- Adjusted stack change logic to be a bit better. - Thanks The-Voidw

description:

一个 UI 类库，提供一些 UI 组件

        Relative positioning

description:
Do you like whips? Do you like Calamity? So do we! 
Unofficial Calamity Whips is a mod that aims to add several whips to the Calamity mod, in order to fill in progression gaps for summoner whip builds.


DISCLAIMER: Unofficial Calamity Whips is in no way affiliated with the Calamity Dev team. It is just a mod for fans of Calamity, created by a fan of Calamit

title: Better Zoom
description:

[h3]This mod allows you to zoom in and out much further than what's possible in Vanilla.[/h3]
[h3]Very useful to people who play in lower resolutions or who want to have high resolution sprites.[/h3]

title: More Accessory Slots (More Accessories)
description:
Adds up to 50 additional accessory slots (default 3) - completely configurable!
Also adds a setting to allow any accessory in vanity slots (default disabled).
Additionally, you can specify a number of "vanity only" slots to add!
Fully supports loadouts if desired!

I missed having vanity accessories when using other mods that make vanity slots functional, so

title: Terraria Overhaul (Configuration Update!)
description:
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mirsario/TerrariaOverhaul/dev/Logo_Header.png[/img]

A large mod for Terraria that focuses on increasing overall enjoyment of the game, via improving aspects such as: combat looks, feel, & mechanics, movement, camera, ambience, and even the entire soundtrack.

The Work-in-Progress 5.0 version for Terraria 1.4 is a compl

description:

Auto fish

This mod can help you fish automatically. Which means auto pull and cast bobbers while holding a fishing pole.
Auto Casting mode will automatically turn on when you are fishing and turn off when you stop fishing.

You can see this mod's source code

title: Dialogue Panel Rework
description:
This mod completely reworks NPC dialogue panel and sign editing panel. Inspired by the mobile version.
Text scrolling is added. You can hold left to make it scroll faster.
Mods that also modified NPC dialogue panel might not work with this mod.
If issues happend, please leave a comment on this mod's Steam Workshop page.

description:

Calamity Ranger Expansion is a mod that provides several extra ranger ammunitions and accessories, in order to provides more options for rangers and play for fun, instead of doing strict researches about "Who is the strongest equipment set now" or "How overpowered this thing is" all

title: Loot Beams
description:
A special thank-you to everyone who has supported this small mod that I threw together in a few minutes, I never would have imagined something like this becoming as popular as it is, and for that I am very grateful.

Latest Update:
Extremely minor behavior change to beams, they now fade out when you grab the item, which should make it pretty satisfying to co

title: Fargo's Music Mod
description:
This mod contains music for Fargo's Souls Mod.

Credit to the original composers: Sakuzyo/削除, Infected Mushroom, ProVGM, Yuri O.[quote=tModLoader FargowiltasMusic]
Developed By Fargo & Terry & Javyz[/quote]

title: Calamity - Fargo's Souls DLC
description:
Makes the Eternity Mode in Fargo's Souls Mod compatible with other mods.
Officially maintained by Fargo's Mods developers.

Currently supports:
-Calamity Mod
-Wrath of the Gods

INCOMPATIBLE mods:
-Infernum Mod
-Calamity Overhaul
-Other major content mods, such as Thorium
-Basically anything else that changes Boss AI

-Adds the Eternity-Revengeance and Masoc

title: Shop Expander
description:
Shop expander aims to solve a problem encountered by many players using multiple large mods.
Town NPCs have a limited amount of free shop inventory space.
When multiple different mods add items to a single vanilla NPC's shop, it can overflow, causing any additional items to not show up.
The issue is further compounded by the fact that some items might be add

title: Improved Movement Visuals
description:
This mod changes the player's visuals without affecting gameplay. It allows the player to look at the cursor, turn to face the cursor, and lean forwards or backwards while moving. It also includes NPC rotation changes which allow slimes to lean while they jump and enemies with zombie AI or critters to lean similarly to the player.

•This mod is highly config

title: HP Awareness
description:
This is a simple client-side mod that contains:
[list]
    [*]Hurt and low HP/Health overlays
    [*]Player HP bar
    [*]Audio and visual indicator above you whenever potion sickness wears off
    [*]Debuff indicators above you whenever you obtain a debuff
    [*]Extra, optional features such as audio indicators, gray vision, and more
[/list]
Each feature i

title: Calamity Mod Extra Music
description:
A port of the 1.3 mod "Calamity Mod Extra Music", with permission from ENNWAY (aka Turquoise, composer of all the music). Now on 1.4.4!

This mod aims to add themes for vanilla features that don't already have unique themes. This mod is client-side, so you do not have to install it on the server for it to work.

Boss themes:
-King Slime
-Eye of Cthulhu
-Eate

title: Begone, Evil! (Disable Evil Biome Spread)
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/W2c5CX6.gif[/img]

This mod allows biome spread to be toggled in all worlds similar to the Infection Spread toggle available in Journey mode. By default, biome spread will be disabled just by enabling this mod.

Crimson, Corruption, and Hallow biome spread are affected by this mod.

The setting is saved per world. 

If you'd like to

title: Better Blending
description: Better Blending simply modifies which tiles blend together, primarily blending environmental tiles to make the world look less disconnected, such as ores blending with stone, ice, or other ores. Sandstone, granite, and marble also blend with stone, dirt, and grass to increase the ease of blending for builders, while keeping building blocks untouched to not d

title: Heart Crystal & Life Fruit Glow
description:
Makes life crystals & life fruits emit light.

Comes with a config, if you want only life crystals or life fruits to emit light, and not both.

This mod's source code is available on my Terraria mods GitHub repo: https://github.com/chev2/terraria-mods
[quote=tModLoader LifeSourcesLight]
Developed By Chev[/quote]

title: Angler Shop
description:
Angler Shop (formally "No Fishing Quests"), Adds two shop buttons to the Angler. 
One Button is to buy utility items and equipment and the other for decorative items and vanity sets.

Now you can get your Cell Phone without needing to fish endlessly! For more info visit my homepage!
The Quest button is still there.

If you still like to complete quests but a

title: OmniSwing
description:
Makes every weapon in the game auto-swing/auto-shoot. 

Because why the heck not?

NEW IN V3.0: Configurable via Mod Settings!

Special thanks:
CrimsHallowHero for fixing spears.
Pop000100 for maintaing the mod.

[quote=tModLoader]Developed By gardenapple[/quote]

title: CoolerItemVisualEffect
description:
Translated by Deepseek:

Modified the visual effects of melee weapons, adding customizable light effects that can be adjusted in the settings.

In server settings, administrators can choose to disable these modifications or enable actual effect changes.

Added weapon back display in the world or character selection interface.

Additional light effects for it

title: Gravitation Don't Flip the Screen
description:
This mod makes the gravity inversion effect not flip your screen, only the player flips.

Github: https://github.com/Cyrillya/GravityDontFlipScreen

title: Antisocial
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/W2c5CX6.gif[/img]

Antisocial allows all social accessory slots to be used as normal accessory slots. It's super cheaty, obviously.

A config allows for social armor to also be used, as well as limiting the number of affected social accessory slots.

Modded accessory slots are also affected, there is a config toggle for this behavior

title: Smarter Cursor
description: Smarter Cursor is a fairly simple mod that tweaks the way smart cursor works with platforms, allowing it to better reflect your intentions when building. No more constantly making stairs when you just want to make a flat bridge, as this mod fixes that issue entirely (while still allowing you to build stairs when you want to). It also improves smart cursor wi

title: [1.4.4] Magic Storage魔法存储拼音搜索
description:
1.4.4 版本 Magic Storage魔法存储拼音搜索
让魔法存储(Magic Storage)Mod支持拼音及拼音首字母搜索
比如你想找“土块”，你可以输入“tukuai”或者“tk”来搜索，当然，输入“uk”也是可以的(tukuai的一部分)
不用切换输入法，不用输入中文，甚至不用记住中文名(?)，只要知道拼音就可以搜索到了，是不是很方便捏
现已近乎完美适配多音字，要搜索宝藏袋可以用“baozangdai”而不是“baocangdai”了


抄了Cyrilly和xxx(cms)大佬的代码，感谢大佬代码的解惑

title: Bosses As NPCs
description:
Do you like a huge excess of Town NPCs?
Do you enjoy managing the happiness of 25 extra Town NPCs?
Ever wanted bosses that you have defeated to move in as Town NPCs?

Well this is the mod for you!

[b] Each vanilla boss has their own Town NPC that will arrive after the respective boss has been killed. [/b]
Each Town NPC sells their boss drops. Expert and Mas

title: LogSpiral's Library
description:
Translated by Deepseek:
Mod Library for Log Spiral
Includes texture resources, shader programs, C# code libraries, and more.
Currently, its primary focus is on managing light effect rendering and sequence editing functionality.
By default, press "Y" to open the editing panel.

title: Magic Builder
description:
Magic Builder

Tired of building the same old wooden boxes every time you start a new Terraria playthrough? Magic Builder makes housing fun and easy with biome-themed houses and utility structures that can be summoned with magical consumables. 

The mod also features a new NPC called the Homebearer, who is obsessed with homes and can communicate with them. T

title: Infernum Mode Music
description:
Special music for the Infernum Mode. Works without Infernum enabled.
Do note that PinpinNeon, the musician and owner of these tracks, intends and wishes for this music mod to be used during infernum mode fights!
While you're free to use this music mod outside of infernum mode, the music is tailored for said mode specifically, and you may find that the tracks

title: Atmospheric Torches
description:
This mod simply adds an orange tint to normal torches and tiki torches, with their placed tiles and biome torches getting a slight flicker for atmosphere. The flicker can be disabled and brightness edited in the mod's config. 

Unfortunately, due to complicated code stuff the flicker can't be added to the held or dropped torch item.
Also, there is an extreme

title: Consolaria
description:

Tons of exclusive mobile & old-gen console features were removed with the release of Terraria 1.3. [b]Consolaria[/b] brings this unique content back, reworked and rebalanced for modern Terraria.

[b]This includes:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Lepus, Turkor & Ocram[/b] - all with brand new AI, Treasure Bags, Master Mode drops & music themes

title: zh-Hans localization for Calamity's Vanity
description:

title: Terraria Ambience
description:
Terraria Ambience is a mod that adds liveliness to your little Terraria world. You can hear animals, environmental sounds, and more.
This will allow you to relax in your playthroughs more.

Developers:

- RighteousRyan (Programmer)
- William (Mod Icon Artist)

Most Recent Update:

- You can now hear other players slipping and sliding on ice
- Add WeaponOut s

title: Spirit Classic
description:
-- By Team Spirit --

Spirit currently adds:
- 1401 new items!
- 41 new armor sets!
- 8 new bosses​!
- 3 brand new biomes: the Spirit, the Asteroid Field and the Briar!
- A complete rework of the Ocean biome!
- A brand new Quest System!
- 255 new enemies and minibosses!
- 3 new events: the Tide, the Jelly Deluge, and the Mystic Moon!
- A new Weapon Enchantme

title: Terraria Ambience API
description:
This is the API behind the mod named TerrariaAmbience. Use this if you wish to add underlying ambient tracks to your mod (be it birds, crickets, whatever).
Refer to the wiki at https://github.com/RighteousRyan1/TerrariaAmbienceAPI/wiki

Update 1.0.1:

- Fixed a huge oversight

title: Starlight River
description:

Stunning and unique multi-phase bosses, challenging encounters, tons of unique weapons for every class, a dynamic and in-depth approach to buildcrafting, and tons of secrets.
Will you walk the path countless shattered civilizations left behind? Will you harness the energies that destroyed them

title: Summoner UI (Latest Stable Release)
description:
This mod adds an indicator for your minion and sentry slots by your health and mana bars. This mod is inspired by a suggestion I saw by u/Russ_Guss_Doodles from the r/Terraria subreddit. (Their account is linked as the homepage)

Localization Credits: 
- English localization by myself 
- Polish localization by Gryfu 
- Russian localization by Alino4kaHvoshch

title: Fancy Lighting
description:
Fancy Lighting improves the game's lighting and graphics!

[h2]Features[/h2]
[list]
    [*]Smooth lighting
    [*]Ambient occlusion
    [*]Accurate shadows
    [*]Improved sky rendering
    [*]Simulated normal maps
    [*]HDR rendering (tone mapped to SDR)
    [*]Bloom and depth of field
    [*]Camera mode compatibility
[/list]

For the best performance, try

title: Armor Modifiers & Reforging
description:
[b]Looking for a bit of more armor buffs? Armor Modifiers is a small mod that enables vanilla-based reforging for armor. The Goblin Tinkerer can now add modifiers for your armor, albeit a bit more pricey compared to accessory counterparts.[/b]

[h1]Usage[/h1]
Simply head on over to the Goblin Tinkerer when you unlock him and place your armor into the reforge

title: Syla's Resource Pack Library
description:
Allows for the replacement of textures from Asset<T> and Texture2D objects with resource packs. 

How to make a resource pack for a mod that supports this:
1. Instead of a Content folder, use a ModContent folder.
2. Inside of this folder, follow the mod's folder layout.
3. Put your replacement textures in the same place in your resource pack.

Ex: replacing

description:

[*] Displays items you are holding
[*] Customise poses available via the Mod Configuration menu
[/list]

title: Shared World Map
description:
Shared World Map is a mod that allows players to share what they've explored on any world.

Features:
Share map data in real time as you explore.
Share previously explored sections of your map by selecting the desired region on your fullscreen map.
Share all map data currently revealed with the press of a button.
Request map data from other players on your w

title: Friendly NPCs Don't Die
description:
Makes Friendly NPCs not take damage from hostiles. 

Flymeal still can hurt NPCs.

title: DPSExtreme
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/W2c5CX6.gif[/img]

[h1]DPS Extreme![/h1]
Ever wondered who dealt the most damage to a boss? Ever felt the need to track your Damage Per Second in relation to your friends? Have you ever wanted sweet, sweet looking meters to show off how much your character dominates bosses? Well, you are in luck, as DPSExtreme is now available for us

title: Impact Library
description:
A library mod which adds collision surfaces, allowing one to make custom movable and rotatable platforms and walls which collide with the player independantly from tiles.

 Collision Surfaces are orientable "wall" objects which have their positions determined by two end points. 
 To use collision surfaces, they must be defined and updated from another class

title: Helpful NPCs
description:
Helpful NPCs is a mod that adds five new NPCs that sell items that are usually boring to get.

NPCs:
- Miner: Sells bars, gems, and natural blocks; Requires a Glimmering Stone crafted from one stone block and gold coins
- Hunter: Sells monster drops/soul/essence related items and ammo; Requires a Glistening Gel crafted from one gel and gold coins
- Fisherman

title: WorldGen Previewer
description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/W2c5CX6.gif[/img]

This mod changes the world generation screen to include a preview of the map as it generates. You can also pause, resume, repeat, skip, or cancel generation as you like.

For example, you can repeat the dungeon step to generate multiple dungeons. If you don't like how a world is looking, simply click cancel and you

title: Calamity Fables
description:
Calamity Fables is a new standalone ground-up reimagining of the popular Calamity Mod. It's made by a group of former developers, including the previous lead artist, as well as other familiar faces in the community. We hope to add ideas that we (the former developers) couldn't see through during our time developing Calamity. 

This mod is NOT a Calamity Addo

title: tML Language Pack Fix
description:
Fixed the bug which language packs do not work in tML
You may use any language pack after this mod is enabled

Technical support: Cyril (https://github.com/tModLoader/tModLoader/pull/2617)

title: Fargo's Best of Both Worlds
description:
This mod allows you to choose various world gen options. Several are usually found in secret seeds and some totally unique ones.
Several pieces of world gen can also be multiplied or toggled off completely.

Currently you can:

Multiply:
-Trees
-Living Trees
-Surface Caves
-Floating Islands
-Marble
-Granite
-Spider Caves
-Hives
-Gems
-Chests
-Pots
-Life Crys
